job_title: Intern Business Transformation at Allianz SE (m/f/d)
job_description: Step into the role of Intern Business Transformation at Allianz SE and support our Business Transformation team. Assist with resource coordination, agile project activities, and people development initiatives. Gain hands-on experience in business process management and agile environments while collaborating with diverse stakeholders. Join us to shape innovative solutions and drive impactful change.

Step into the role of Identity Governance Analyst and support Allianz Australia's Identity and Access Governance program. Collaborate with IT and security teams, assist with access reviews, and help improve identity management controls. Join a culture of learning and development while contributing to a secure digital environment.

Join our team as an Incident Management Expert, where you'll play a vital role in safeguarding Allianz's operations. Leverage your skills in crisis coordination and incident management to ensure seamless execution of processes. Be part of a collaborative culture that prioritizes continuous improvement and delivers measurable impact.

Step into the role of Menadżer Wsparcia Sprzedaży Bancassurance i dołącz do zespołu odpowiedzialnego za realizację planów sprzedażowych, współpracę z partnerami biznesowymi oraz wdrażanie innowacyjnych rozwiązań w sektorze bancassurance. Pracuj hybrydowo, rozwijaj swoje kompetencje i buduj sukces z Allianz Polska.

job_title: Specialist "Life Claims, Accidents, and Travel Assistance" - Maternity cover
job_description: Step into the role of Specialist Life Claims, Accidents, and Travel Assistance and handle the registration, processing, and approval of insurance claims. Engage with clients via calls and correspondence, utilizing your English proficiency and computer literacy. Enjoy a hybrid work model and opportunities for career growth within Allianz Bulgaria.

Step into the role of Specijalist za planiranje i kontroling prodaje i pridružite se našem timu u Allianzu! Očekuje vas rad na razvoju i implementaciji strategija prodaje, analiza podataka, izrada izvještaja te suradnja s različitim timovima. Prijavite se i doprinesite izvrsnosti našeg poslovanja!

Join our team as a Manager of Protection and Resilience, where you will ensure compliance with our framework and lead critical business continuity planning efforts. If you have strong analytical skills and a passion for risk management, we want to hear from you!

Step into the role of Information Security Junior Manager and support executive accountability by aligning security objectives, engaging with senior stakeholders, and producing high-impact reports for Boards and Regulators. Contribute to strengthening Allianz Group’s resilience posture through structured oversight and collaboration across entities.

Step into the role of Working Student – Compliance Strategy & Architecture and support our team in shaping global compliance frameworks, driving transformation, and collaborating on strategic initiatives. Gain hands-on experience in compliance, risk management, and technology while working in a dynamic, project-based environment alongside senior stakeholders.

Join our team as an Expert Full Stack Developer and leverage your skills in Java, Spring Boot, and Angular to create innovative software solutions. Collaborate with cross-functional teams and lead projects that drive real customer impact. If you have a passion for technology and a desire to mentor others, we want to hear from you!
